{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Center Warehouse Officer",
  "description": "OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world&rsquo;s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers &mdash; bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Center Warehouse Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Inventory Management: Oversee daily stock levels, conduct physical and cycle counts, update inventory records (bin cards, ledgers), and resolve discrepancies.
	Receiving &amp; Dispatch: Supervise incoming deliveries, verify quality and quantity against orders, prepare goods for storage and shipment, and ensure accurate dispatch.
	Operations &amp; Coordination: Maintain proper warehouse layout, ensure equipment is functional, liaise with sales, logistics, and suppliers, and provide regular status reports.
	Quality &amp; Safety: Inspect goods for damage, ensure compliance with safety standards, and maintain a clean and organized warehouse.
	Staff Supervision (if applicable): Support the Warehouse Manager in supervising warehouse staff and enforcing standard operating procedures.


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of a high school diploma with relevant experience in stock or warehouse management.
	Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in computer usage, MS Office (Excel, Word), and inventory management software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and operate in a physically demanding environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N50,000 - N70,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Service Center Warehouse Officer Job at OPPO




        
    

        
        OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world’s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers — bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Center Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Inventory Management: Oversee daily stock levels, conduct physical and cycle counts, update inventory records (bin cards, ledgers), and resolve discrepancies.
	Receiving & Dispatch: Supervise incoming deliveries, verify quality and quantity against orders, prepare goods for storage and shipment, and ensure accurate dispatch.
	Operations & Coordination: Maintain proper warehouse layout, ensure equipment is functional, liaise with sales, logistics, and suppliers, and provide regular status reports.
	Quality & Safety: Inspect goods for damage, ensure compliance with safety standards, and maintain a clean and organized warehouse.
	Staff Supervision (if applicable): Support the Warehouse Manager in supervising warehouse staff and enforcing standard operating procedures.


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Minimum of a high school diploma with relevant experience in stock or warehouse management.
	Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in computer usage, MS Office (Excel, Word), and inventory management software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and operate in a physically demanding environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N50,000 - N70,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world&rsquo;s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers &mdash; bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Days: Monday &ndash; Friday

Description


	Are you creative, tech-savvy, and passionate about digital engagement? We are looking for a Social Media Officer to join our team at OPPO.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s social media platforms
	Create engaging and creative content (posts, videos, captions)
	Monitor trends and implement strategies to increase engagement
	Respond to comments, messages, and customer inquiries
	Track and report social media performance metrics


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2-3 years of experience.
	Proven experience in social media management
	Strong content creation and communication skills
	Knowledge of social media trends and tools
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.",

Social Media Officer Job at OPPO




        
    

        
        OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world’s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers — bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Days: Monday – Friday

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you creative, tech-savvy, and passionate about digital engagement? We are looking for a Social Media Officer to join our team at OPPO.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and grow the company’s social media platforms
	Create engaging and creative content (posts, videos, captions)
	Monitor trends and implement strategies to increase engagement
	Respond to comments, messages, and customer inquiries
	Track and report social media performance metrics


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2-3 years of experience.
	Proven experience in social media management
	Strong content creation and communication skills
	Knowledge of social media trends and tools
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the susbject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager, Group Operations",
  "description": "Berekkah Consulting Limited&nbsp; - Our client&nbsp;in the Aviation industry is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager, Group Operations

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Operating Officer (COO) / Accountable Manager
Direct Reports:&nbsp;Head of Flight Operations, Head of Ground Operations, Head of Maintenance Planning, Head of Cabin Services, Head of OCC (Operations Control Centre), Head of Safety &amp; Quality (functional oversight)

Job Summary&nbsp;


	They seek&nbsp;a&nbsp;General Manager, Group Operations who will be responsible for the safe, compliant, efficient, and cost-effective execution of all airline operations across the network.
	The successful candidate will ensure operational reliability, regulatory compliance, on-time performance, safety assurance, and seamless cross-functional coordination across Flight Operations, Engineering, Ground Handling, Cabin Services, and Commercial functions.
	This role requires a strong leader capable of maintaining operational integrity within Nigeria&rsquo;s dynamic aviation environment, characterized by infrastructure constraints, airspace congestion, fuel supply variability, and weather volatility.


Key Responsibilities
Operational Safety &amp; Regulatory Compliance


	Ensure full compliance with:
	
		Nigerian Civil Aviation Authority regulations
		International Civil Aviation Organization SARPs
		International Air Transport Association IOSA standards (where applicable)
		Maintain operational readiness for audits and regulatory inspections.
		Oversee implementation of Safety Management System (SMS).
		Ensure corrective actions from audits are closed within approved timelines.
	
	


Operational Performance &amp; Reliability:


	Deliver On-Time Performance (OTP) targets.
	Reduce delays attributable to operational inefficiencies.
	Oversee aircraft utilization and turnaround efficiency.
	Manage disruption recovery strategies (weather, technical, airspace constraints).
	Ensure effective coordination via the Operations Control Centre (OCC).


Flight Operations Overs:


	Ensure compliance with flight duty time limitations.
	Monitor crew productivity and roster optimization.
	Oversee SOP adherence and operational discipline.
	Support fuel efficiency and cost optimization initiatives.


Ground &amp; Airport Operations:


	Standardize ground handling processes across stations.
	Ensure SLA compliance with handling agents.
	Maintain safety and security standards at all airports.
	Drive improvements in turnaround time performance.
	(Primary airports may include Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt and other domestic stations operated under the oversight of the Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria.)


Engineering &amp; Maintenance Coordination:


	Coordinate with CAMO and approved MRO providers.
	Ensure aircraft availability aligns with schedule integrity.
	Monitor technical dispatch reliability.
	Drive reduction in AOG incidents and maintenance-related delays.
	Operational Cost Control
	Optimize fuel consumption in collaboration with Flight Ops.
	Monitor crew productivity ratios.
	Control operational overheads within budget.
	Improve cost per ASK (Available Seat Kilometer).


Crisis &amp; Disruption Management:


	Lead operational response during:
	Severe weather events
	Airspace closures
	Industrial action
	Aircraft technical incidents
	Ensure passenger recovery plans are activated swiftly.
	Provide operational briefings to Executive Management.


Cross-Functional Coordination:


	Align closely with Commercial on schedule feasibility.
	Coordinate with HR on crew planning and manpower forecasting.
	Liaise with Security and Safety on risk mitigation.
	Provide operational input to fleet acquisition and induction planning.


Key Performance Indicators


	On-Time Performance (OTP)
	Aircraft utilization rate
	Technical dispatch reliability
	Safety performance indicators (SPIs)
	Delay minutes per sector
	Cost per ASK (CASK &ndash; operational component)
	Crew productivity metrics
	Audit findings &amp; closure rate


Experience and Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Aviation Management, Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum 12&ndash;15 years of aviation operational experience.
	At least 5 years in senior airline operations leadership.
	ATPL, Aircraft Engineering License, or relevant aviation qualification preferred.
	Strong understanding of Nigerian airspace, airport infrastructure, and operational constraints.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Operational leadership under pressure
	Strong regulatory knowledge
	Data-driven performance management
	Crisis management capability
	Cross-functional collaboration
	Decisive and structured problem-solving


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;berekkahconsultingjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;General Manager&rdquo;&nbsp;as the&nbsp;subject of the email.",

Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Operating Officer (COO) / Accountable Manager

Job Summary

		Maintain operational readiness for audits and regulatory inspections.
		Oversee implementation of Safety Management System (SMS).
		Ensure corrective actions from audits are closed within approved timelines.

Ground & Airport Operations:


	Standardize ground handling processes across stations.
	Ensure SLA compliance with handling agents.
	Maintain safety and security standards at all airports.
	Drive improvements in turnaround time performance.
	(Primary airports may include Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt and other domestic stations operated under the oversight of the Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria.)


Engineering & Maintenance Coordination:


	Coordinate with CAMO and approved MRO providers.
	Ensure aircraft availability aligns with schedule integrity.
	Monitor technical dispatch reliability.
	Drive reduction in AOG incidents and maintenance-related delays.
	Operational Cost Control
	Optimize fuel consumption in collaboration with Flight Ops.
	Monitor crew productivity ratios.
	Control operational overheads within budget.
	Improve cost per ASK (Available Seat Kilometer).


Crisis & Disruption Management:


	Lead operational response during:
	Severe weather events
	Airspace closures
	Industrial action

Cross-Functional Coordination:

title: Job Vacancies at Johnvents Industries Limited
content:
Johnvents Foods Limited launched Johnvents Pure Cocoa Powder, an everyday beverage that provides 100% cocoa nourishment. It acquired and set up a cocoa product factory in Idanre for the production of Oluji Pure Cocoa Powder, Johnvents Chocolate drink, Cocoa Pops, Cocoa Cube, and other cocoa-based consumer products.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At Johnvents Foods, the goal is to create nourishing experiences that foster happiness, build bonds and nurture unforgettable moments. Whether you’re hosting a special occasion, enjoying an intimate dinner for two, or simply treating yourself to a moment of food bliss, you can be sure of an unforgettable moment filled with nourishment, innovative flavors, treasured memories, and sensational experiences. This is because we believe food is a catalyst for creating meaningful experiences that nourish both the body and the soul.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Maintenance Technician (IMA Corazza)

Job Location: Ondo

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Maintenance Technician with hands-on experience in IMA Corazza packaging machines to join our dynamic team.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform routine maintenance, servicing, and repairs on IMA Corazza packaging machines
	Diagnose and troubleshoot mechanical, electrical, and pneumatic faults
	Ensure machines operate at optimal efficiency with minimal downtime
	Execute preventive and corrective maintenance schedules
	Monitor equipment performance and recommend continuous improvement initiatives
	Maintain accurate maintenance logs, reports, and documentation
	Support installation, commissioning, and upgrades of packaging equipment
	Ensure strict compliance with health, safety, and quality standards


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc. in Mechanical, Electrical, or Industrial Engineering
	3–5 years of experience in maintenance of packaging machines, preferably IMA Corazza equipment
	Strong knowledge of mechanical systems, PLCs, and automation
	Ability to read and interpret technical manuals and schematics
	Proven hands-on experience in troubleshooting and fault diagnosis
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in FMCG or food processing industry
	Knowledge of preventive maintenance systems
	Strong teamwork and communication skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for training and career development
	A dynamic and professional work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Maintenance Technician – IMA Corazza" as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Research and Development (R&D) Manager

Job Location: Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Research and Development Manager to lead our R&D initiatives.
	In this role, you will be responsible for developing new product formulations, conducting in-depth research, leading cross-functional teams, managing R&D projects, and driving innovation within our organization.
	You will collaborate with other departments to enhance product quality and ensure we meet evolving market demands.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage R&D projects from conception to completion.
	Develop new product formulations and enhance existing products.
	Guide and mentor cross-functional teams to achieve project goals.
	Implement innovative solutions to improve product development and processes.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure product quality and compliance with industry standards.
	Continuously explore market trends to inform R&D strategies.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Food Science, Engineering, or a related field (Master’s degree is an advantage).
	Prior experience in the food and beverage sector or a similar industry is highly desirable.
	Strong team management and leadership skills.
	Proven experience in project management, particularly in the food and beverage industry.
	Ability to conceptualize and implement innovative solutions.
	Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.
	Commitment to quality, process improvement, and innovation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "R&D Manager" as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Cost Accountant

Job Location: Ondo

Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Cost Accountant to join our dynamic team and support effective cost management and financial performance across our operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Analyze and monitor production costs, including raw materials, labor, and overheads
	Prepare cost reports and provide insights to support management decision-making
	Conduct variance analysis and investigate discrepancies between actual and standard costs
	Develop and maintain standard costing systems and cost control procedures
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes
	Monitor inventory valuation and ensure accuracy in stock records
	Collaborate with production and procurement teams to optimize cost efficiency
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal controls
	Maintain accurate financial records and documentation.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	4 - 5 years of experience in cost accounting, preferably in FMCG or manufacturing
	Strong knowledge of cost accounting principles and financial analysis
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Preferred Skills:


	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Experience with ERP systems
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for training and career development
	A dynamic and professional work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Cost Accountant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
